stage1_regime_classifier.rule: VIX quartile assignment using rolling-252d quartiles fit on train period only

stage2_conditional_alpha.regularization: L1 with α selected via 3-fold expanding-window nested CV on train_pool with 60-day embargo
stage2_conditional_alpha.fit_strategy: one model per regime quartile (4 models total)

feature_pit_provenance.insider_*: ParquetInsiderScorer with delisting_events loaded (F4 fix locked by tests/test_pit_insider_delisting_exclusion.py); 180d fire-sale exclusion
feature_pit_provenance.vix_*, term_spread_*: FRED daily-only series (DGS10, DGS3MO, VIXCLS); PIT-clean per pit_audit_2026_04_30 M3+M4 PASS
feature_pit_provenance.ret_*, vol_*, near_52w_high_*, dollar_vo: per-ticker OHLCV via HistoryStore.truncate_to(asof); survivorship-correct per O2 invariant locked by tests/test_pit_universe_delisted_inclusion.py
feature_pit_provenance.rolling_beta_*, idiosyncratic_vol_*: rolling 252d (resp 60d) regression of ticker excess return on Mkt-RF, window strictly < asof

target_definition.construction: raw excess return over RF (5d-forward close-to-close minus 5d-cumulative RF)
target_definition.post_hoc_attribution: Carhart-4F regression of realised portfolio returns on Mkt-RF/SMB/HML/MOM (CONTEMPORANEOUS, standard academic Carhart 1997). NOT pre-residualized at target level (per Gu-Kelly-Xiu 2024 update; preserves information, post-hoc attribution separates discovery from factor-loading rediscovery).

portfolio_construction.ranking: predicted forward excess return per (ticker, asof) from the regime-conditional Lasso
portfolio_construction.universe: AlphaLens PIT universe (yfinance + survivorship parquet), ADV ≥ $5M filter applied at scoring time

anti_overfit_constraints.feature_to_obs_budget: Harvey-Liu-Zhu / Feng-Giglio-Xiu heuristic: N_features ≤ √(T × Sharpe_target) / 2; with T~10⁵ × cross-section, target Sharpe 0.4 → comfortably under 63
anti_overfit_constraints.no_post_hoc_feature_addition: any new feature requires a new pre-registration with its own Bonferroni denominator

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F α t-stat on holdout 2024-04-30 → 2026-04-30 portfolio returns
success_criteria.pass_rule: Holdout Carhart-4F α t-stat ≥ Bonferroni threshold for class multi_source_two_stage_search_2026_04_30 (n=1 initially → |t| ≥ 1.96) AND holdout Sharpe ≥ 0.5 AND holdout α annualized ≥ 3% AND holdout MaxDD ≤ 35%
success_criteria.mid_rule: α t-stat ≥ 1.5 AND Sharpe ≥ 0.3 → MID verdict; refine and re-pre-register before any deploy
success_criteria.fail_rule: α t-stat < 1.5 OR Sharpe < 0.3 → FAIL, log to ledger, narrow search space for next experiment per feedback_keep_searching_screeners.md and feedback_literature_not_oracle.md
success_criteria.phase_robustness_followup: If holdout PASSES, run multi-phase audit (5 phase offsets per multi_phase library) on the 2014-2026 full window with the same architecture; PASS only if every phase α t-stat ≥ 1.5 AND mean α t-stat ≥ Bonferroni threshold for then-current class count
